transcript: Speaker A (Pharmacist): Ma'am, do you have a prescription? Speaker B (Before): English don't know. Speaker A: Ma'am, do you have a prescription? Speaker C (After): Yes, here it is. Could I also get something for a mild fever? Speaker A: Sure. Speaker D (Banker): Madam, what kind of account would you like to open? Speaker B: Kannada please. English little little. Speaker D: Madam, what kind of account would you like to open? Speaker C: A savings account please. Also, I would like to know about the mobile banking facility. Speaker E (Stylist): Ma'am, what treatment would you like today? Speaker B: Nanage English artha agilla. [I don't understand English.] Speaker E: Ma'am, what treatment would you like to have today? Speaker C: I would like a cleanup and a hair spa. Also, would you suggest me any treatment for my dry hair? Speaker E: Yes. Speaker F (Presenter): Nodidra? English maatadoke bandilla andre eshtu kashta agutte. Nanna friend obbaru nanage SpeakX app bagge helidru. Idondu AI English teaching app. Idaralli neevu English maatadodu kaliyabahudu. Adu bari hadinaidrandha ippattu dinadalli. Naanu pratidina bari hadinaidrandha ippattu nimisha practice maadde ee app alli. Ivaga nanna fluency nodi nimge artha aagtirbahudu alla. I am very grateful to SpeakX app. Ee app nanna life eh change maadbitu. Neevu kuda bari eradu roopaayiyalli elu dina trial tagondu nantara English maatadodu kaliyabahudu. Nanna maatu keli. Eegale hogi SpeakX app download maadi. [See? How difficult it is if you don't know English. A friend told me about SpeakX, an AI English learning app where you can learn to speak in 15-20 days. I practiced 15-20 minutes daily. You can see my fluency now. I'm grateful to SpeakX; it changed my life. You can also get a 7-day trial for just 2 rupees. Download the SpeakX app now.]
on_screen_text: Before / After, a prescription?, English don't know., Yes, here it is., Could I also get something for a mild fever?, Sure., Madam what kind of account would you like to open?, Kannada please., English little little., A savings account please., Also I would like to know about the mobile banking facility., Ma'am what treatment would you like today?, Nanage English artha agilla., Ma'am what treatment would you like to have today?, I would like a cleanup and a hair spa., Also suggest me any treatment for my dry hair?, Yes., Nodidra?, English maatadoke bandilla andre eshtu kashta agutte., Nanna friend obbaru nanage SpeakX app bagge helidru., Idondu AI English teaching app., Idaralli neevu English maatadodu kaliyabahudu., Adu bari hadinaidrandha ippattu dinadalli., Naanu pratidina bari hadinaidrandha ippattu nimisha practice maadde ee app alli., Ivaga nanna fluency nodi nimge artha aagtirbahudu alla., I am very grateful to SpeakX app., Ee app nanna life eh change maadbitu., Neevu kuda bari eradu roopaayiyalli elu dina trial tagondu nantara English maatadodu kaliyabahudu., Nanna maatu keli., Eegale hogi SpeakX app download maadi., Download SpeakX App, Start 7 Days Trial Now
summary: The ad contrasts a woman's struggle to speak English in daily situations with her fluent communication after using the SpeakX app. The presenter shares her success story, highlighting that daily practice on the AI-powered app helped her improve. She invites viewers to start a 7-day trial for just 2 rupees by downloading the app.
